description_long: This is a standard manual screwdriver featuring a contoured wooden handle with a warm, amber-brown finish and visible wood grain. The handle is ergonomically shaped with subtle grooves for improved grip and comfort during use. Extending from the handle is a long, straight metal shaft that terminates in a flathead tip, suitable for slotted screws. The metal shaft appears to be made of steel, exhibiting a smooth, slightly reflective surface. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the handle or shaft. The screwdriver appears well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or damage.
description: A classic flathead screwdriver with a contoured wooden handle and a long steel shaft, showing no visible wear or markings.
description_view_0: The screwdriver is seen from the tip, showing the flathead blade and the rounded end of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the steel shaft and the ergonomic contours of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Viewed from the handle end, the rounded, grooved wooden grip is prominent, with the shaft extending away.
description_view_3: Another side profile, mirroring view 1, displays the opposite side of the handle and shaft.
attribute_handle_type: contoured wooden handle with visible grooves and a smooth finish
